claimText: KFUPM's AI+X page describes AI+X as an initiative designed to equip every undergraduate student with essential AI skills and says students begin with foundational AI coursework before their selected academic programs.
normalizedValue: AI+X undergraduate AI coursework is described as broad undergraduate AI-skills preparation.

citation.publisher: King Fahd University of Petroleum & Minerals
